creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

current version of Unifi5 controller apparently has a bug which affects adoption over L3 (check section Controller Bugfixes/Changes from 5.2.7 on link below):
https://community.ubnt.com/t5/UniFi-Updates-Blog/UniFi-5-2-9-is-released/ba-p/1694199

I can confirm this - I can adopt APs over L3, but I can't upgrade them via controller's web interface, I need to do it manually through ssh.

Also bundled firmware versions are bumped up.

Is it possible to get 5.2.9 anytime soon?

Thank you in advance.
